_about: Structured swipe-file catalog for the wedding-pagoda build. Human-readable companion to references.md (which feeds the RAG). Reference-only / write-our-own; license-flagged. type: repo|article|tool|font. license 'unverified' = study-only until confirmed.

entries.title: madblade/waves-gerstner
entries.note: Analytic normals from wave derivatives — our drape lighting.

entries.title: Catlike Coding — Waves
entries.note: Gerstner displacement + analytic tangent/normal; technique only.

entries.title: CIS565 WebGL Cloth Simulation
entries.note: WebGL2 transform-feedback cloth in the vertex shader; sim alternative to our analytic sway.

entries.title: logancool/curtainEffect
entries.note: WebGL curtain sim; direct subject reference.

entries.title: Self Shadow — Righting Wrap
entries.note: Energy-conserving wrap/half-Lambert diffuse for soft fabric.

entries.title: Wikibooks — GLSL Translucent Bodies
entries.note: Silhouetteness back-light fake for sheer cloth; don't copy code.

entries.title: keaukraine/webgl-flowers
entries.note: Closest reference: instanced mobile flower field; reuse code-as-reference, author our own art.

entries.title: Efficient WebGL Vegetation
entries.note: Vertex shader is the low-end bottleneck; instancing/LOD guidance.

entries.title: GPU Gems 3 ch.16 — Crysis Vegetation
entries.note: Alpha-cutout leaves + procedural vertex wind.

entries.title: LearnOpenGL — Bloom
entries.note: Bright-pass + downsample + separable blur; additive = glow.

entries.title: frost.kiwi — Dual-Kawase Blur
entries.note: Constant-tap blur, mobile-ideal; repo license unverified.

entries.title: DesLauriers — Filmic Effects for WebGL
entries.note: Warm grade + vignette + film grain in one pass.

entries.title: GPU Gems 3 ch.13 — God Rays
entries.note: Screen-space volumetric shafts; deferred/optional v2.

entries.title: WebGL Fundamentals — Text using HTML
entries.note: World->screen DOM projection for the drifting words.

entries.title: lusionltd/WebGL-Scroll-Sync
entries.note: Lusion's own canvas/DOM scroll-sync demo.

entries.title: curtains.js
entries.note: DOM elements -> WebGL textured planes; concept reference (we're zero-dep).

entries.title: 14islands/r3f-scroll-rig
entries.note: Persistent-canvas + DOM-proxy pattern (concept; R3F).

entries.title: darkroomengineering/lenis
entries.note: Smooth scroll; optional (hand-rolled lerp is zero-dep).

entries.title: WebGL2 Fundamentals — Instancing
entries.note: One draw per mesh type via instancing.

entries.title: BabylonJS/Spector.js
entries.note: Frame capture: GL calls, shaders, FBOs (dev-only).

entries.title: donmccurdy/glTF-Transform
entries.note: Mesh/texture optim if authoring glTF; adds a decoder dep, avoid on gig path.

entries.title: sjfricke/awesome-webgl
entries.note: Curated WebGL resources meta-list.

entries.title: sparkjsdev/spark
entries.note: Gaussian-splat renderer, mobile; acquire splats, never train.

entries.title: potree/potree
entries.note: Large point-cloud streaming/LOD reference (three.js-based).

entries.title: isl-org/MiDaS
entries.note: Offline depth maps; clean commercial fallback (Depth-Anything-V2 Small = Apache).

entries.title: EB Garamond / Cormorant / Fraunces
entries.note: Body + display faces; commercial-safe.

entries.title: Colors & Fonts
entries.note: Palette + font-pairing browsing (FMHY).

entries.title: svg/svgo + SVGOMG
entries.note: SVG optimization for vector assets.

entries.title: GoogleChrome/lighthouse
entries.note: Load CWV gating (distinct from frame-time).

entries.title: Playwright
entries.note: Headless verify + visual tripwire; already a devDep.

entries.title: dequelabs/axe-core
entries.note: DOM accessibility checks.

entries.title: rawpixel — public-domain botanicals
entries.note: Pampas/dried/wildflower/vintage florals; CC0 in PD collections, site mixes premium.

entries.title: Realtime Colors
entries.note: Preview the boho earth palette live + contrast.

entries.title: Hero Patterns
entries.note: Subtle organic SVG patterns (woven/macrame motifs); attribution required.
